task_yaml.task:
Please find Daisy Keech's abs workout video on YouTube and watch in full the video that best matches the following title:

`Daisy Keech hourglass abs workout but just the exercises (with timer and breaks)`

For this task, it is enough to identify the resource by title; it does not have to come from Daisy Keech's official channel.
If you ultimately use Daisy Keech's official original version to cross-check the exercises, clearly state in the results which video you used,
and explain how it corresponds to this edited version with the timer.
You must directly watch the video frames and timer content. Do not download subtitles or transcripts, and do not guess from an exercise list elsewhere;
the exercise order and durations must come from the video you actually watched.

Task requirements:
1. Extract the following for each exercise:
   - Exercise name (in English)
   - Duration or number of reps
   - Rest time
2. Capture at least one screenshot of a standard posture for each exercise and save it to
   `/tmp_workspace/results/abs_workout_frames/`.
3. Generate an illustrated workout guide at `/tmp_workspace/results/abs_workout_guide.md`.

The final document must include:
- A full exercise table
- Screenshot references for each exercise
- A brief explanation of how you confirmed this is the target video
